summary: Tested ZET Mindshare new session features: Templates (5 working templates), 50+ Fonts, Fast Select in header, Ruler and Grid functionality. All features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page shows Google OAuth + Email auth options
Dashboard loads with document list
Editor page loads correctly
Templates panel opens via tool-templates button (data-testid)
Templates panel shows 6 templates: Blank Document, CV/Resume, Report, Presentation, Letter, Invoice
CV template creates professional content: YOUR NAME, Professional Title, CONTACT, EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS sections
Invoice template creates table structure: INVOICE header, From/Bill To sections, Description/Qty/Price/Total table, Subtotal, Tax (18%), TOTAL
Font panel shows 51 font buttons (50+ fonts available)
Font panel includes fonts: Arial, Helvetica, Verdana, Roboto, Montserrat, Poppins, Times New Roman, Georgia, Merriweather, Courier New, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, Impact, Bebas Neue, Oswald, Raleway
Fast Select tools visible in header: Text, Hand, Pencil, Image (positioned after prev/next page buttons)
Fast Select indicated by lucide-zap icon in header
Ruler panel opens via tool-ruler button
Ruler panel has 'Show Rulers' checkbox with description
Ruler panel has 'Snap to Grid' option
Horizontal ruler visible at top of canvas with measurements (50, 100, 150, 200...550)
Vertical ruler markers visible on left side of canvas
Grid panel opens via tool-grid button
Grid panel has 'Show Grid' checkbox
Grid panel has 'Grid Size: 20px' slider
Grid panel has 'Snap to Grid' checkbox
Grid SVG pattern implemented (1 pattern, 1 rect confirmed)
critical_code_review_comments: FONTS array in editorConstants.js has 51 fonts (goal was 50) - VERIFIED
applyTemplate() function in Editor.js creates professional content for all 5 templates - VERIFIED
Fast Select tools (text, hand, draw, image) shown in header near undo/redo buttons - VERIFIED
CanvasArea.js implements ruler with CSS positioning and ruler markers - VERIFIED
CanvasArea.js implements grid with SVG pattern - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from this session verified: (1) Templates - 6 templates available (Blank, CV, Report, Presentation, Letter, Invoice), (2) CV template creates professional resume layout with sections, (3) Invoice template creates billing document with table structure, (4) Font panel has 51 fonts from Arial to Raleway, (5) Fast Select bar is in header showing Text/Hand/Pencil/Image tools near undo/redo buttons, (6) Ruler panel has Show Rulers checkbox, enables horizontal ruler (top) and vertical ruler (left side) with measurements, (7) Grid panel has Show Grid checkbox with Grid Size slider (20px default) and Snap to Grid option.

features_tested_summary.login_page: VERIFIED - Shows Continue with Google + Sign in with Email
features_tested_summary.dashboard: VERIFIED - Shows Documents, New Document, Quick note
features_tested_summary.cv_template: VERIFIED - Creates YOUR NAME, Professional Title, CONTACT, EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS
features_tested_summary.invoice_template: VERIFIED - Creates INVOICE header, From/Bill To, table with Description/Qty/Price/Total, Subtotal, Tax, TOTAL
features_tested_summary.font_panel: VERIFIED - 51 fonts visible, includes all major font families
features_tested_summary.fast_select_header: VERIFIED - Text, Hand, Pencil, Image buttons in header after page nav buttons
features_tested_summary.ruler_panel: VERIFIED - Show Rulers checkbox, Snap to Grid option
features_tested_summary.ruler_visibility: VERIFIED - Horizontal ruler at top (50-550 markers), vertical ruler on left
features_tested_summary.grid_panel: VERIFIED - Show Grid checkbox, Grid Size: 20px slider, Snap to Grid checkbox
features_tested_summary.grid_visibility: VERIFIED - SVG pattern implemented (1 pattern, 1 rect)
